title: Hush House
overview:
Successfully collect all five artifacts as a team and bring them to the summoning circle in the living room.

The team loses the game if they have three or more players possessed at the same time.
contribution: This was a group effort, with everyone working together each build session. I then wrote up the final document of the ruleset.
process:
Hush House is a teamwork board game where five players enter an abandoned, haunted house to retrieve five assigned artifacts and return them to the summoning circle in the living room.

Each turn, players move through the house based on dice rolls while managing noise generated by movement and environmental hazards like creaky floors and freak-out tiles.

As noise builds, players risk being possessed and sent to the basement, where they are temporarily removed from normal play until exorcised using holy water. Strategic coordination is essential, as players must balance exploration, artifact collection, and rescuing teammates while avoiding being possessed.

The game is won if all artifacts are successfully returned, but lost if three or more players are possessed at the same time.
